items.title: #Hornets are picking up the $3.8 million team option on Pat Connaughton's contract, league sources told @theobserver.
items.author: Rod Boone
items.body_excerpt:
#Hornets are picking up the $3.8 million team option on Pat Connaughton's contract, league sources told @theobserver.

The veteran was a huge voice in the locker room this past season and Charlotte even brought him back after he got caught in a roster crunch at trade deadline.
